title: Gunnar's Ground

startPoint.en: Speak to Dororan at the Gunnarsgrunn gate.
startPoint.es: Habla con Dororan en la puerta de Gunnarsgrunn.

kills: Haakon the Champion (level 40, optional); if he wants you to challenge him.

rewards.display: 5 quest points (only if Romeo & Juliet has not been completed)
200 experience lamp (Skill must be level 5 or higher)

rewards.name: Crafting
rewards.display: Ability to get further Crafting tasks from Dororan (requiring up to level 90 Crafting, temporary skill boosts allowed)

postQuest.display: 2,000 experience for engraving "With beauty blessed." on a ruby bracelet - requires 42 Crafting
10,000 experience for engraving "Gudrun" on a dragonstone necklace - requires 72 Crafting
20,000 experience for engraving "The most beautiful girl in the room." on an onyx amulet - requires 90 Crafting

text.en: Speak to Dororan near the eastern entrance to Barbarian Village.
text.es: Habla con Dororan cerca de la entrada este de Barbarian Village.

chatOptions: 1 There must be something you can do.

text.en: You will receive a scroll containing a love poem, go to Edgeville and speak to Jeffery near the furnace.
text.es: Recibirás un pergamino con un poema de amor. Ve a Edgeville y habla con Jeffery cerca del horno.

chatOptions: 1 I'm here about a gold ring.
1 I was hoping you would trade me a gold ring.

text.en: Take the gold ring back to Dororan.
text.es: Lleva el anillo de oro de vuelta a Dororan.

chatOptions: 1 What do you want me to engrave?

text.en: Click the 'engrave' option on the ring (tool belt chisel works), and show it to Dororan.
text.es: Pulsa la opción 'grabar' en el anillo (el cincel del cinturón de herramientas sirve), y muéstraselo a Dororan.

text.en: Speak to Gudrun (west of Dororan), but avoid telling her that Dororan is a dwarf.
text.es: Habla con Gudrun (al oeste de Dororan), pero evita decirle que Dororan es un enano.

chatOptions: 1 So, you want me to talk to your father?

text.en: Talk to Gunthor, found in the longhall.
text.es: Habla con Gunthor, que se encuentra en el salón principal.

chatOptions: 1 I need to speak with you, chieftain.
1 Your daughter seeks permission to court an outlander.
2 What are we going to do?

text.en: The phrases are "stray", "threat", and "swept to war".
text.es: Las frases son "extraviarse", "amenaza" y "arrastrados a la guerra".

text.en: Give the poem to Gudrun to read to her father.
text.es: Dale el poema a Gudrun para que se lo lea a su padre.

text.en: Talk to Gudrun again to complete the quest.
text.es: Habla de nuevo con Gudrun para completar la misión.
